subject: chore(docs): tighten fleet-alignment branch; drop orphaned web/index.html
body:
Wrap-pass cleanup following the two alignment commits on this branch.

- Delete `web/index.html`. Expo Router's static export uses
  `app/+html.tsx` as the HTML source of truth; `web/index.html` had no
  runtime references and was carrying a legacy `z-index: 9999` that the
  new scale couldn't reach. Remove the three references to it from
  CLAUDE.md (PWA §HTML Template paragraph; Z-Index Scale rule #5).
  Replace rule #5 with a useful invariant — every current modal uses
  React Native's `<Modal>` (native stacking), so `Z.modal` stays
  reserved for any future inline dialog instead.
- `constants/zIndex.ts`:
  - Strengthen the doc comment on why `Z.debug` covers the
    `<noscript>` JS-disabled fallback (no React tree ever mounts, so
    "topmost" is semantically equivalent to a dedicated `noscript`
    tier that could never conflict with anything).
  - Explain `Z.modal`'s reserved status (modals route through RN's
    `<Modal>` component, which manages its own stacking).
  - Drop the `ZTier` type export — unused, and the Cleanup standard
    ("delete unused exports immediately") applies.
- `docs/TODO.md`:
  - Remove the "Legacy implementation patterns — triage decisions"
    block from High Priority. Those items described completed work
    (2 × DELETE, 1 × DELETE-local); git history is the changelog.
  - Add a new top-level "## Cross-repo actions" section holding the
    one remaining forward-looking item (upstream TIMER_LEAKS to
    glow-props). That work can't be done from a synctone session
    because the GitHub MCP scope is restricted to this repo; the
    section surfaces it for a future glow-props session.
  - Remove stale `HISTORY.md` reference comment.
- `docs/SESSION_NOTES.md`: rewrite with a fresh snapshot of this
  session's work (alignment + z-index + wrap cleanup), per the
  "rewrite at session end" rule in CLAUDE.md §Documentation.
- Verified with `tsc --noEmit` against installed deps: 14 pre-existing
  errors at HEAD, 14 at the commit before this branch's z-index work
  — zero new errors introduced. The one hit in `Toast.tsx` is a
  pre-existing `return null` vs `JSX.Element` mismatch unrelated to
  the z-index changes.

Tags: documentation, cleanup, fleet-alignment, z-index
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
title: tighten fleet-alignment branch; drop orphaned web/index.html
